exercises.title: Sentence Building
exercises.description:
Arrange these words into correct SVO sentences:
1. reads / Ali / books
2. plays / She / guitar
3. football / They / every day / play
4. English / We / at school / study
5. not / He / understand / the lesson
hints: Remember SVO order: Subject first, then Verb, then Object
Time expressions usually go at the end

solution.code:
1. Ali reads books.
2. She plays the guitar.
3. They play football every day.
4. We study English at school.
5. He doesn't understand the lesson.

exercises.title: Adjective/Adverb Placement
exercises.description:
Add the word in parentheses in the correct position:
1. She speaks English. (fluently)
2. This is a table. (wooden, round)
3. He is late. (always)
4. They live in Delhi. (happily)
5. I wake up early. (usually)
hints: Adverbs of manner go AFTER the verb
Adverbs of frequency go BEFORE the main verb

solution.code:
1. She speaks English fluently.
2. This is a round wooden table. (opinion before size before material)
3. He is always late. (after "be")
4. They live happily in Delhi.
5. I usually wake up early.
